## Source: amazon-inspector (9163fb244b7c2f4964eda703f5a3de55f6858b9f5a7f7508b69e1b0ce3b21b1f)
The package payerpath-customer-lib was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (6d04f46237f19269078c5d1334e4f1c0ff8ac1b19fe00827c52c647d65416562)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'payerpath-customer-lib' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
